name: Pizza Pinwheels
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Onion; peeled and thinly sliced
3 medium Bell peppers; cored and thinly sliced (green, red, yellow)
1 pound Part-skim milk mozzarella cheese; shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Lightly coat a baking sheet with olive oil.
3. Divide the dough into 4 balls.
4. On a lightly floured surface, roll each dough ball into a 6-inch circle.
5. Spoon 1/2 cup of marinara sauce into each circle and spread it to the edges.
6. Heat olive oil in a saute pan over medium-high heat.
7. Cook the onion and pepper slices until soft, about 5 minutes. Set aside to cool.
8. Layer the cooled vegetables over the dough circles and top with mozzarella and Parmesan.
9. Roll each dough circle into a log shape.
10. Using a serrated knife, cut each log into 6 slices.
11. Place the slices on the prepared baking sheet and brush them with olive oil.
12. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes.
